transcript: If these lands could speak, what would they say? They would say welcome. They would invite you in to share this extraordinary part of the world. place it's yours to this land is wide open for sharing our culture welcomes all cultures so let us show you around. Lead you to our natural wonders. And throw you headfirst into our beautiful countryside. Because what you'll find down here What you'll hear within our mountains Our lakes And our people What you'll discover On your journey throughout this precious land Is that you're welcome here make yourself at home
